name: Frontline: Assault Corps WW2
short_description: A World War II Turn-based Tactical Wargame crafted with passion and care for history and strategy enthusiasts alike.
detailed_description:
Greeting, Friends! 🎖️

We’re thrilled to introduce a new chapter in the "Frontline" series.

⭐Step into the strategic world of WWII like never before with the latest addition:    "Frontline: Assault Corps WW2". A fast-Paced, hex-based strategy game set in the dramatic era of World War 2, complete with real historical units and maps.

⚔️FEATURES:

✔ New Game engine, graphics, animations, gameplay & special FX.

✔ Massive weapons arsenal: 200+ unique units

✔ 48 Unique Historical scenarios

✔ Level up & Active abilities

✔ Fog of War

✔ HD graphics

✔ Reinforcements: up to 45+ unique units can now be recruited / map

✔ Intuitive interface

✔ Lean learning curve

✔ Zoom controls

✔ Light turn limit

⭐Command the iconic forces of the Allies—USA and Commonwealth, the formidable Axis Wehrmacht, or the relentless USSR Red Army.

Each faction provides a distinct and immersive style of gameplay, challenging you to adapt and conquer across 48 uniquely crafted maps.🗺️

🥇Our innovative "Frontline Engine 2.0" powers this latest installment, delivering enriched graphics, refined mechanics, and dynamic combat scenarios that elevate the series to new heights.

🎁"Frontline is now 10 years old! I’m genuinely blown away by this milestone, and I have all of you to thank for it. Your support over the years has meant the world to me, and I'm just so grateful to have access to such an amazing community. It’s your enthusiasm and feedback that keep me going. Here’s to more adventures together! Thank you all so much from the bottom of my heart". 🙏❤️ -I.G

Whether you're a seasoned tactician or a newcomer to the genre, this humble yet thrilling experience will challenge your strategic skills and transport you to a pivotal era in history. Are you ready to change the course of history? The frontline awaits!

Thank you for Wish-listing!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Romanian, Arabic, Korean, Polish, Czech, Dutch, Greek, Indonesian, Thai, Bulgarian, Danish, Finnish, Hungarian, Norwegian, Traditional Chinese, Swedish
